novel_features.name: Offline FTS search
novel_features.description: Search every article you've ever seen on Picnic locally, instantly, with no API hit.

novel_features.name: Reorder past delivery
novel_features.description: Re-add every article from a previous delivery to your current cart in one shot.

novel_features.name: Spend trend
novel_features.description: See spend per month or category from your wallet history, with deltas vs prior period.

novel_features.name: Slot watch
novel_features.description: Poll for delivery slots that match a weekday/time-window filter and exit zero when one opens.

novel_features.name: Pantry recurring
novel_features.description: Predict re-buy candidates: articles ordered N or more times in the last K weeks.

novel_features.name: Price drift
novel_features.description: Surface price changes on watched articles across local store snapshots.

novel_features.name: What changed since
novel_features.description: Aggregate new deliveries, wallet entries, and cart edits since a relative timestamp.

novel_features.name: SQL escape hatch
novel_features.description: Read-only SQL against the local Picnic store for ad-hoc questions.

novel_features.name: Export
novel_features.description: Dump the entire local store as JSON, CSV, or NDJSON.

novel_features.name: Doctor
novel_features.description: Health check: auth valid, base URL reachable, store schema OK.
